title: wifi-telemetry-event
description: One Wi-Fi/TCP telemetry reading, emitted per device per sample interval.

device_id.description: Stable device identifier from device metadata. Used as the Kafka message KEY (keys the stream by device -> per-device ordering, avoids hot partitions).

timestamp_utc.description: Event time in UTC, ISO-8601. Drives Postgres table partitioning (by day) and SQL time-window aggregations.

freq_band.description: Wi-Fi frequency band the device is associated on.

channel_num.description: Wi-Fi channel number the device is associated on.

rtt_ms.description: Round-trip time / link latency in milliseconds. Null on a dropped sample.

link_budget_db.description: Link budget in dB at sample time (may be negative). Null on a dropped sample.

avg_link_utilization_pct.description: Average link utilization as a percentage, 0-100. Null on a dropped sample.

cwnd_bytes.description: TCP congestion window size in bytes. Null on a dropped sample.

rwnd_bytes.description: TCP receive window size in bytes. Null on a dropped sample.

buffer_event.description: Label: true if a buffering/stall event occurred this interval. ML prediction target.
